title: Kathirundhu Kathirundhu Lyrics Vaidhegi Kaathirundhaal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
nethu vara serthuvacha
aasaigal vegudhadi
nee irundhu naan anacha
nimmadhiyaagumadi

mukkulichi naanedutha
muththu sirpi neethane
mutheduthu nenjukulla
pathirama vecheney

naan padikkum moganamey
naan padaicha seethanamey
thaen vadicha paathiramey
thenmadhura poocharamey

neeru nilam naalu pakka
naan thirumbi paarthaalum
andha pakkam indha pakkam
aththanayum neeyaagum

aalayitta sengarumba
aattugira emmanasa
yaara vittu dhoodhusolli
naanraivan un manasa

nethu vara serthuvacha
aasaigal vegudhadi
nee irundhu naan anacha

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kathirundhu Kathirundhu?

The song captures the emotions of longing and anticipation in a romantic context.

Who composed the music for Vaidhegi Kaathirundhaal?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Vaali.

Who sang Kathirundhu Kathirundhu?

The song was sung by P. Jayachandran.

When was the movie Vaidhegi Kaathirundhaal released?

The movie was released in 1984.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kathirundhu Kathirundhu from Vaidhegi Kaathirundhaal beautifully portrays the feelings of waiting and yearning in a romantic relationship. Set against Ilaiyaraaja's mesmerizing composition, the lyrics by Vaali evoke a sense of nostalgia and deep emotion. P. Jayachandran's soulful rendition adds to the song's timeless appeal, making it a cherished classic. The song conveys the universal theme of love and longing, resonating with listeners across generations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of Kathirundhu Kathirundhu from the movie Vaidhegi Kaathirundhaal. This classic melody, composed by Ilaiyaraaja and penned by Vaali, captures the essence of longing and love. Let the soulful voice of P. Jayachandran transport you to a world of romance and nostalgia.
stanzaMeanings: Waiting and waiting, the times have passed, the eyes filled with flowers are hurting.
The dreams I saved for tomorrow are rushing, if you are here, I will find peace.
Waiting and waiting, the times have passed, the eyes filled with flowers are hurting.
The pearl I carved, you are the sculptor, I kept the pearl safely in my heart.
What I kept is now missing, I search for it, singing tunes without sleeping at night.
My love that I study, my creation, the cup filled with honey, the sweet flower.
What happened to my eyes, they are filled with tears.
Waiting and waiting, the times have passed, the eyes filled with flowers are hurting.
Even if I look in all four directions, everything there and here is you.
You are the one who flows in my heart without leaving, you are the one who dries up the river.
The red sugarcane I planted is swaying, my heart dances, I send a message to your heart.
The heart is hurt, the reason is known.
Waiting and waiting, the times have passed, the eyes filled with flowers are hurting.
The dreams I saved for tomorrow are rushing, if you are here, I will find peace.
